name: @gimodi/client
description: A voice and video chat application.

scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:win && npm run deploy:mac && npm run deploy:linux
scripts.deploy:win: npm run deploy:win:squirrel && npm run deploy:win:zip
scripts.deploy:linux: npm run deploy:linux:deb && npm run deploy:linux:appimage && npm run deploy:linux:zip
scripts.deploy:win:squirrel: npm run build && electron-forge make --platform win32 --targets @electron-forge/maker-squirrel
scripts.deploy:win:zip: npm run build && electron-forge make --platform win32 --targets @electron-forge/maker-zip
scripts.deploy:mac:zip: npm run build && electron-forge make --platform darwin --targets @electron-forge/maker-zip
scripts.deploy:linux:deb: npm run build && electron-forge make --platform linux --targets @electron-forge/maker-deb
scripts.deploy:linux:appimage: npm run build && electron-forge make --platform linux --targets @reforged/maker-appimage
scripts.deploy:linux:zip: npm run build && electron-forge make --platform linux --targets @electron-forge/maker-zip
scripts.publish:win:squirrel: npm run deploy:win:squirrel && node scripts/publish.js --platform win --format squirrel
scripts.publish:win:zip: npm run deploy:win:zip && node scripts/publish.js --platform win --format zip
scripts.publish:mac:zip: npm run deploy:mac:zip && node scripts/publish.js --platform darwin --format zip
scripts.publish:linux:deb: npm run deploy:linux:deb && node scripts/publish.js --platform linux --format deb
scripts.publish:linux:appimage: npm run deploy:linux:appimage && node scripts/publish.js --platform linux --format appimage
scripts.publish:linux:zip: npm run deploy:linux:zip && node scripts/publish.js --platform linux --format zip
scripts.publish:win: npm run publish:win:squirrel && npm run publish:win:zip
scripts.publish:linux: npm run publish:linux:deb && npm run publish:linux:appimage && npm run publish:linux:zip
scripts.publish: npm run publish:linux && npm run publish:win && npm run publish:mac
scripts.nightly:win:squirrel: npm run deploy:win:squirrel && node scripts/publish.js --platform win --format squirrel --channel nightly
scripts.nightly:win:zip: npm run deploy:win:zip && node scripts/publish.js --platform win --format zip --channel nightly
scripts.nightly:mac:zip: npm run deploy:mac:zip && node scripts/publish.js --platform darwin --format zip --channel nightly
scripts.nightly:linux:deb: npm run deploy:linux:deb && node scripts/publish.js --platform linux --format deb --channel nightly
scripts.nightly:linux:appimage: npm run deploy:linux:appimage && node scripts/publish.js --platform linux --format appimage --channel nightly
scripts.nightly:linux:zip: npm run deploy:linux:zip && node scripts/publish.js --platform linux --format zip --channel nightly
scripts.nightly:win: npm run nightly:win:squirrel && npm run nightly:win:zip
scripts.nightly:linux: npm run nightly:linux:deb && npm run nightly:linux:appimage && npm run nightly:linux:zip
scripts.nightly: npm run nightly:linux && npm run nightly:win && npm run nightly:mac
